content:
# Well Test Interpretation

**Summary**: The process of analyzing pressure and rate data from well tests to determine reservoir properties.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001]] used well-test interpretation to evaluate horizontal well performance.

## Scientific Context

- [[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001]] Crucial for characterizing horizontal wells where standard interpretation is complicated by parameter correlation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001]] Automated via neural networks to identify flow regimes.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The approach allows for the automation of well-test interpretation of horizontal wells. ([[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001, p. 217]])
